subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are associated with the Threshold of the All-Glorious! His honour Ardashír, like unto a lion, hath found his way unto the luminous wilderness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو منتسبین درگاه کبریا جناب اردشیر مانند شیر به بیشه نور منیر پی برد و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
